hero.description: The full-service agency that architects, builds, and scales the systems behind your revenue.

scatteredSystems.title: Scattered Systems
scatteredSystems.description: Your data lives in 10 different tools. Nothing talks to anything. Every insight requires manual exports and guesswork.

manualEverything.title: Manual Everything
manualEverything.description: Hours lost every week on repetitive tasks your team shouldn't be doing. Data entry, follow-ups, reporting — all by hand.

noRealFunnel.title: No Real Funnel
noRealFunnel.description: Leads come in and fall through the cracks. No automation, no nurture sequence, no system to turn interest into revenue.

techOverwhelm.title: Tech Overwhelm
techOverwhelm.description: Too many tools, too many subscriptions, zero strategy. You're paying for a stack that's working against you.

items.unifiedSystem: Unified system, single source of truth
items.consistentBrand: Consistent, premium brand at every touchpoint

softwareDev.title: Software Development

marketing.title: Marketing & Funnels

saas.headline: 3x Revenue in 90 Days
saas.description: Built a complete sales infrastructure and automated lead nurture system for a B2B SaaS startup, tripling MRR within one quarter.

ecommerce.headline: 500% ROAS on Paid Ads
ecommerce.description: Designed and built a full-funnel marketing system with automated retargeting, email flows, and conversion-optimized landing pages.

realEstate.headline: 10,000+ Hours Saved/Year
realEstate.description: Replaced manual processes with a custom CRM and automation suite, freeing the team to focus on closing deals instead of admin.

discovery.title: Discovery & Strategy
